title: bertiera borbonica var. stipulata
intro: Bertiera borbonica var. stipulata, also known as the Madagascar Bertia, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, primarily native to Madagascar. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bertiera borbonica var. stipulata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
